source_name: Geoscience Australia - Australia's Identified Mineral Resources

fields.scope: Geoscience Australia's annual Australia's Identified Mineral Resources (AIMR) report quantifies Economic Demonstrated Resources (EDR) — the JORC-equivalent national-scale resource base.
fields.primary_source_document: Geoscience Australia, Australia's Identified Mineral Resources (annual).
fields.keying_plan: Key EDR figures and Australia's share of global economic resources for the strategic critical minerals. AIMR reports a fresh edition in early Q4 each year.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed Economic Demonstrated Resources for the strategic critical minerals. Australia holds the world's largest economic resources of nickel, second-largest of copper and lithium, and very large rare earths reserves. AIMR is the canonical national audit.
citation: Geoscience Australia, Australia's Identified Mineral Resources.
